name: hds-redteam
description: Multi-agent red-team review for proposal-style documents (PRDs, technical RFCs, business plans, security reviews). Five modes (-prd, -sec, -rfc, -biz, default) tailor four parallel critics — logic, technical, UX/audience, business risk — to each domain. Outputs a single self-contained HTML dashboard with concrete scenarios, external citations, confidence scores, and falsification conditions.
